style_effects: Flickering translucent violet mist particles drift slowly around Charmander's form, with shadows elongating and bending unnaturally at the edges of its silhouette. Its aura pulses with a cold, eerie purple light that casts distorted reflections on nearby surfaces, while faint energy waves ripple through its semi-transparent body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
